sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80910" key="pepiqei=n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεπῐθεῖν</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεπερο-θοῦσα</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεπερό-θοιμεν</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεπερό-θοιεν</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεπερο-θήσω</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεπέρο-θμεν</orth>, <sense id="n80910.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πείθω</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
